summary: SmartDine India restaurant ordering system testing completed. Backend APIs 93% functional, frontend core flows working. Key issue: Payment order creation failing, empty menu preventing full e2e testing.

critical_bugs.issue: Payment order creation fails when order status is Ready
critical_bugs.impact: Customers cannot make payments even when orders are ready

integration_issues.issue: Menu appears empty for customers despite TheMealDB API working

passed_tests: Menu API fetch working (returns empty array)
Order placement creating Unpaid/Ordered status correctly
Kitchen order fetch and status updates working
Manager settings, orders, and reports functional
Frontend UI loading and navigation working
Vibrant Indian restaurant theme implemented correctly

critical_fixes: Fix payment order creation endpoint - check Razorpay configuration and order status validation
Investigate why menu items are not being saved/retrieved properly from database
Ensure TheMealDB imported items are properly added to menu with available=true status
action_item_for_main_agent.description: Payment flow is blocked and customers cannot see menu items. These prevent complete e2e testing.
